subcodes.first_line: We make mention in the Book of him who drew nigh unto the All-Glorious, the All-Bountiful, on a day wherein all turned away from His Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر فی الکتاب من تقرب الی العزیز الوهاب فی یوم فیه اعرض عن الوجه کل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement
